title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Rajasthan Tourism

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Rajasthan Tourism
jsonLd.description:
Rajasthan Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Rajasthan Tourism:
Rajasthan Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajasthan Tourism!
